race.comment: USUAL LIMITS (6) broke through impressively last start, and despite copping a nasty gate, another forward showing is expected. Each way claims again. MISS DRAMATIC (10) is racing well enough and bounced back into form with a second 2 weeks ago. She has the right draw to feature in the finish again, while UCELLE (11) has been knocking on the door and should be competitive again from the perfect inside draw. INVISIBLE TARGET (5) strips fitter second-up and can improve sharply. Best of the rest.
